title: Uruguayan Empanada Filling with Bitter Greens
description: A twist on traditional empanadas, this filling features sautéed bitter greens and a hint of Uruguayan flavor.
instructions: Sauté onion and garlic in a pan until softened.
Add bitter greens, mirin, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper. Cook until greens are wilted.
Roll out empanada dough and cut into circles.
Place a tablespoon of the filling in the center of each circle.
Fold the dough in half and press edges together to seal.
Brush tops with a little water and place on a baking sheet.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
